scripts.predev: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const kill=cmd=>{try{execSync(cmd,{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){}};try{const r=execSync('wmic process where \"name=\'node.exe\' and commandline like \'%next%dev%\'\" get processid /format:value',{encoding:'utf8'});(r.match(/ProcessId=(\\d+)/g)||[]).forEach(p=>kill('taskkill /F /PID '+p.replace('ProcessId=','')));}catch(e){};try{const r=execSync('netstat -ano -p TCP',{encoding:'utf8'});const m=r.match(/TCP[\\s]+[^\\s]+:3001[\\s]+[^\\s]+[\\s]+LISTENING[\\s]+(\\d+)/);if(m)kill('taskkill /F /PID '+m[1]);}catch(e){};const{spawnSync}=require('child_process');spawnSync('ping',['-n','2','127.0.0.1'],{stdio:'ignore'});const fs=require('fs');try{fs.rmSync('.nextbuild/dev',{recursive:true,force:true})}catch(e){}"
